히브리서 9:1.content: Now indeed even the first covenant had ordinances of divine service and an earthly sanctuary.

히브리서 9:2.content: For a tabernacle was prepared. In the first part were the lamp stand, the table, and the show bread; which is called the Holy Place.

히브리서 9:3.content: After the second veil was the tabernacle which is called the Holy of Holies,

히브리서 9:4.content: having a golden altar of incense, and the ark of the covenant overlaid on all sides with gold, in which was a golden pot holding the manna, Aaron’s rod that budded, and the tablets of the covenant;

히브리서 9:5.content: and above it cherubim of glory overshadowing the mercy seat, of which things we can’t speak now in detail.

히브리서 9:6.content: Now these things having been thus prepared, the priests go in continually into the first tabernacle, accomplishing the services,

히브리서 9:7.content: but into the second the high priest alone, once in the year, not without blood, which he offers for himself, and for the errors of the people.

히브리서 9:8.content: The Holy Spirit is indicating this, that the way into the Holy Place wasn’t yet revealed while the first tabernacle was still standing.

히브리서 9:9.content: This is a symbol of the present age, where gifts and sacrifices are offered that are incapable, concerning the conscience, of making the worshiper perfect,

히브리서 9:10.content: being only (with meats and drinks and various washings) fleshly ordinances, imposed until a time of reformation.

히브리서 9:11.content: But Christ having come as a high priest of the coming good things, through the greater and more perfect tabernacle, not made with hands, that is to say, not of this creation,

히브리서 9:12.content: nor yet through the blood of goats and calves, but through his own blood, entered in once for all into the Holy Place, having obtained eternal redemption.

히브리서 9:13.content: For if the blood of goats and bulls, and the ashes of a heifer sprinkling those who have been defiled, sanctify to the cleanness of the flesh,

히브리서 9:14.content: how much more will the blood of Christ, who through the eternal Spirit offered himself without defect to God, cleanse your conscience from dead works to serve the living God?

히브리서 9:15.content: For this reason he is the mediator of a new covenant, since a death has occurred for the redemption of the transgressions that were under the first covenant, that those who have been called may receive the promise of the eternal inheritance.

히브리서 9:16.content: For where a last will and testament is, there must of necessity be the death of him who made it.

히브리서 9:17.content: For a will is in force where there has been death, for it is never in force while he who made it lives.

히브리서 9:18.content: Therefore even the first covenant has not been dedicated without blood.

히브리서 9:19.content: For when every commandment had been spoken by Moses to all the people according to the law, he took the blood of the calves and the goats, with water and scarlet wool and hyssop, and sprinkled both the book itself and all the people,

히브리서 9:20.content: saying, “This is the blood of the covenant which God has commanded you.”

히브리서 9:21.content: Moreover he sprinkled the tabernacle and all the vessels of the ministry in the same way with the blood.

히브리서 9:22.content: According to the law, nearly everything is cleansed with blood, and apart from shedding of blood there is no remission.

히브리서 9:23.content: It was necessary therefore that the copies of the things in the heavens should be cleansed with these, but the heavenly things themselves with better sacrifices than these.

히브리서 9:24.content: For Christ hasn’t entered into holy places made with hands, which are representations of the true, but into heaven itself, now to appear in the presence of God for us;

히브리서 9:25.content: nor yet that he should offer himself often, as the high priest enters into the holy place year by year with blood not his own,

히브리서 9:26.content: or else he must have suffered often since the foundation of the world. But now once at the end of the ages, he has been revealed to put away sin by the sacrifice of himself.

히브리서 9:27.content: Inasmuch as it is appointed for men to die once, and after this, judgment,

히브리서 9:28.content: so Christ also, having been offered once to bear the sins of many, will appear a second time, without sin, to those who are eagerly waiting for him for salvation.
